title: Risk Management - Green & Spiegel
content:
Home > U.S Immigration-2 > U.S. Immigration > Risk Management
The immigration landscape in the United States is always changing. Whether the change is the result of politics, the economy, culture, or any other factor, there is a guaranteed impact on businesses that have an international workforce and on undocumented individuals and their families. It is important for employers and individuals to know how to best manage risk and protect themselves from adverse immigration action.
